THE INCREMENTAL GAME

A 3D open-world odyssey with a purple pulse.

Click the button and let the world start breathing.

Patch Notes

  • v0.0.8 - Tonal UI polish with richer purple lighting and premium panel glow
  • v0.0.7 - Added cheeky style and polished top screen depth
  • v0.0.6 - Modern purple beveled UI, black background
  • v0.0.5 - Center main game content after start
  • v0.0.4 - Center start menu overlay content
  • v0.0.3 - Add patch notes and version to start menu
  • v0.0.2 - Added start menu and button
  • v0.0.1 - Initial release: 3D scene and incremental logic
Version: 0.0.9 — ready to play.

The Incremental Game
